project_name: Hilltrack Society for Education, Environment and Energy

design_philosophy.vibe: Editorial, narrative-driven, grounded, trustworthy, natural aesthetics.

rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-serif tracking-tighter text-[#1C3325] leading-none
rules.overline: uppercase text-xs tracking-[0.2em] font-sans font-semibold text-[#C86A41]

layout_spacing.grid_pattern: Bento-style asymmetric for events/achievements. Grid cols-1 md:cols-12 with generous gap-8 to gap-12.

surface_strategies.marketing: Solid flat backgrounds with subtle 1px border (#E3DED8), no drop shadows to maintain editorial flat feel. Large bleeding images.
surface_strategies.admin_dashboard: Clean, flat cards. No glassmorphism. Strict grid layout, highly functional.

component_instructions.header: Solid or Crystal Glass depending on background. If solid: bg-[#F9F6F0]. Navigation links MUST be visible on desktop.
component_instructions.buttons: Flat design. Primary: bg-[#C86A41] text-[#F9F6F0] hover:bg-[#A65431]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1C3325] text-[#1C3325] hover:bg-[#1C3325] hover:text-[#F9F6F0].
component_instructions.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='donate-button').
component_instructions.icons: lucide-react for UI, but rely more on high-quality typography and photography than icons.

animations.interactions: Subtle translate-y lift on cards, fade-in for images, slow organic marquee for partners or key stats.
animations.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all dynamic effects.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use generic Shadcn components for the public marketing site. Use custom HTML/Tailwind for an editorial layout.
For the Admin CMS, use Shadcn but stripped of 'Vercel-look'. Customize to match the earthy brand (flat surfaces, dark green active states, bone backgrounds).
Use generous padding (p-12 to p-24) to create breathing room. Never cramp text.
For hero overlay, do not exceed bg-black/40. Let the mountain imagery breathe.
Ensure data-testid is present on all forms, links, and buttons as per standard testing protocols.
Admin Login should use JWT authentication.
All backend APIs and integrations should be fully built; if logic is absent, MOCK it explicitly and highlight it.
